<!-- walkthrough_start -->

## Walkthrough

This PR introduces a monorepo workspace structure with three packages (CLI, contracts, and engine), integrates Convex backend configuration with an empty schema, and enhances the Son-of-Anton orchestrator's delivery tracking system. The changes extend artifact path metadata through the subagent review recording pipeline, ensure this metadata persists during state synchronization, and update configuration templates and documentation to reflect the new orchestrator capabilities and subtree structure.

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
